measurement_classification: single-run video functional diagnostic, not a benchmark

output_video.codec_policy: H.264 in MP4 requested through avc1; no fallback permitted

timing_boundaries.preprocess: letterbox and RGB NCHW FP32 construction
timing_boundaries.inference: OrtDetector::infer including tensor wrapper, Session::Run, output validation and copy
timing_boundaries.postprocess: YOLOv5 decode, threshold, class-aware NMS, inverse map and clipping
timing_boundaries.visualization: copy source frame and draw labels/boxes
timing_boundaries.video_write: one cv::VideoWriter::write call; writer close/flush is separate
timing_boundaries.pipeline_total: preprocess start through postprocess end; excludes read, visualization and write
timing_boundaries.loop_total: first read start through end-of-stream read; includes all frame stages and loop overhead
